_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: wep21
data.message:
feat: use ament vendor (#1)

Signed-off-by: wep21 <daisuke.nishimatsu1021@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,42 +1,22 @@
-cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.12)
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)
 project(tinyspline_vendor)
 
 find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+find_package(ament_cmake_vendor_package REQUIRED)
 
-include(FetchContent)
-fetchcontent_declare(
-  tinyspline
-  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/msteinbeck/tinyspline.git
-  GIT_TAG        5f0e8fad34e86771cfae3dac4beef5f1858d5610 # v0.6.0
-)
-set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS ON)
-fetchcontent_makeavailable(tinyspline)
-
-install(
-  DIRECTORY
-    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/src/CMakeFiles/Export/lib64/cmake/tinyspline/
-  DESTINATION
-    share/${PROJECT_NAME}/cmake
-)
-install(
-  DIRECTORY
-    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/src/CMakeFiles/Export/lib64/cmake/tinysplinecxx/
-  DESTINATION
-    share/${PROJECT_NAME}/cmake
-)
-install(
-  FILES
-    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/tinyspline-config.cmake
-    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/tinyspline-config-version.cmake
-    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/tinysplinecxx-config.cmake
-    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/tinysplinecxx-config-version.cmake
-  DESTINATION
-    share/${PROJECT_NAME}/cmake
+ament_vendor(tinyspline
+  VCS_URL https://github.com/msteinbeck/tinyspline.git
+  VCS_VERSION 5f0e8fad34e86771cfae3dac4beef5f1858d5610 # v0.6.0
+  VCS_TYPE git
+  CMAKE_ARGS
+    -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON
 )
 
 if(BUILD_TESTING)
   find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
   ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
 endif()
 
-ament_package(CONFIG_EXTRAS tinyspline_vendor-extras.cmake)
+ament_package(
+  CONFIG_EXTRAS tinyspline_vendor-extras.cmake
+)

data.author: Daisuke Nishimatsu
data.message:
feat: initial commit

Signed-off-by: Daisuke Nishimatsu <border_goldenmarket@yahoo.co.jp>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.12)
+project(tinyspline_vendor)
+
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+
+include(FetchContent)
+fetchcontent_declare(
+  tinyspline
+  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/msteinbeck/tinyspline.git
+  GIT_TAG        5f0e8fad34e86771cfae3dac4beef5f1858d5610 # v0.6.0
+)
+set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS ON)
+fetchcontent_makeavailable(tinyspline)
+
+install(
+  FILES
+    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/src/CMakeFiles/Export/lib64/cmake/tinyspline/tinyspline-targets.cmake
+    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/src/CMakeFiles/Export/lib64/cmake/tinyspline/tinyspline-targets-release.cmake
+    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/src/CMakeFiles/Export/lib64/cmake/tinysplinecxx/tinysplinecxx-targets.cmake
+    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/src/CMakeFiles/Export/lib64/cmake/tinysplinecxx/tinysplinecxx-targets-release.cmake
+    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/tinyspline-config.cmake
+    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/tinyspline-config-version.cmake
+    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/tinysplinecxx-config.cmake
+    ${tinyspline_BINARY_DIR}/tinysplinecxx-config-version.cmake
+  DESTINATION
+    share/${PROJECT_NAME}/cmake
+)
+
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_package(CONFIG_EXTRAS tinyspline_vendor-extras.cmake)

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="3">
+  <name>tinyspline_vendor</name>
+  <version>0.6.0</version>
+  <description>The vendor package for tinyspline.</description>
+  <maintainer email="daisuke.nishimatsu1021@gmail.com">Daisuke Nishimatsu</maintainer>
+  <license>Apache License 2.0</license>  <!-- the contents of this package are Apache 2.0 -->
+  <license>MIT</license>  <!-- tinyspline is MIT -->
+
+  <url type="website">https://github.com/msteinbeck/tinyspline</url>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+  <buildtool_depend>git</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@

+
+set(tinyspline_DIR "${tinyspline_vendor_DIR}")
+set(tinysplinecxx_DIR "${tinyspline_vendor_DIR}")
